info.name: Verveguard API
info.description:
Complete API collection for Verveguard Payment Sidecar - Fraud Detection & Merchant Management System.

## Authentication
Use the **Login** request first to obtain tokens. The collection automatically saves `accessToken` and `refreshToken` to environment variables for use in authenticated requests.

## Test Users
- **Super Admin**: superadmin@verveguard.com
- **Admin**: testadmin@verveguard.com
- **Merchant**: testmerchant@verveguard.com
- **Password for all**: Admin123!

item.name: Health & Monitoring
item.description: Spring Boot Actuator endpoints for health checks, metrics, and monitoring

request.description: Overall application health status with component details.
Kubernetes liveness probe - is the app running?
Kubernetes readiness probe - is the app ready to receive traffic?
Application info (build version, git commit, etc.)
List all available metrics.
JVM heap memory usage.
HTTP request metrics (count, latency percentiles).
Active database connection pool connections.
Prometheus-formatted metrics for scraping.
Environment properties (may be restricted in production).
List all loggers and their levels.

Dynamically change log level at runtime.

**Levels:** TRACE, DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR, OFF
List all application caches.
JVM thread dump for debugging.
Download JVM heap dump (large file, use with caution).

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints for login and token refresh

request.description: Authenticates as Super Admin and saves tokens to environment variables for use in other requests.
Authenticates as Admin user.
Authenticates as Merchant user. Use this when testing merchant-specific endpoints.
Generate new access token using the stored refresh token.

item.name: Fraud Detection
item.description: Real-time fraud evaluation and audit trail management

request.description: Health check endpoint for fraud service.

Runs a transaction through the fraud rule engine.

Returns:
- **ALLOWED**: Transaction passed all checks
- **SUSPICIOUS**: Soft flags triggered but allowed
- **BLOCKED**: Hard block rule triggered
Test with high amount to trigger transaction limit rules.
Evaluate transaction for a specific merchant by ID. Requires TRANSACTION_CREATE permission.
Paginated audit log of all evaluated transactions. **Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.**

Create a new admin user. Role must have ADMIN principal type.

**Role IDs:**
- 1: SUPER_ADMIN
- 2: ADMIN
Get the profile of the currently authenticated user.
Paginated list of all system users.
Get user profile by ID.

Update account status.

**Status values:** ACTIVE, INACTIVE, SUSPENDED
Assign a new role to a user. Role must have ADMIN principal type.
Change password for the currently authenticated user.
Admin resets a specific user's password.
Soft delete a user account.

item.name: Merchants
item.description: Merchant lifecycle, KYC verification, and tier management

request.description:
Create a new merchant account. **Requires MERCHANT_CREATE permission.**

**Role ID 3** is the MERCHANT role.
Paginated list of all merchants.

Filter merchants by account status.

**Status values:** ACTIVE, INACTIVE, SUSPENDED, BLACKLISTED

Filter merchants by KYC verification status.

**KYC Status values:** PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED
Get profile of authenticated merchant. **Requires MERCHANT role.**
Get merchant profile by ID.
Update merchant account status.
Update KYC verification status. **Requires MERCHANT_KYC permission.**
Update both account and KYC status in one request.
Add merchant to blacklist. **Requires MERCHANT_BLACKLIST permission.**
Upgrade merchant to the next tier level.
Merchant changes their own password. **Requires MERCHANT role.**
Admin resets merchant password.
Soft delete a merchant account.

Merchant issues a card for themselves. **Requires MERCHANT role.**

**Card Types:** VIRTUAL, PHYSICAL
**Schemes:** VERVE, VISA, MASTERCARD
Get the authenticated merchant's card with account info. **Requires MERCHANT role.**
Merchant blocks their own card. **Requires MERCHANT role.**
Look up any card by card number. **Requires ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN role.**
Paginated list of all cards. **Requires ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN role.**
Get the authenticated merchant's account. **Requires MERCHANT role.**
Look up account by card number. **Requires ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN role.**
Paginated list of all accounts. **Requires ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN role.**

Create a new role.

**Principal Types:** ADMIN, MERCHANT
Paginated list of roles with custom sorting.
Simple list of all roles. Useful for dropdowns.
Get role details including linked permissions.
Grant a specific permission to a role.
Remove a specific permission from a role.
Link multiple permissions to a role simultaneously.
Remove multiple permissions from a role in one request.
Register a new granular permission.
Get full list of all available permissions.
Fetch details for a specific permission.

item.name: Tier Configuration
item.description: Transaction limits and fees for merchant tiers

request.description:
Create new tier configuration.

**Tier values:** TIER_1, TIER_2, TIER_3
Get all tier configurations.
Get tier configuration by ID.
Lookup configuration by tier name.
Update limits for an existing tier.
